properties.query:
let Parser = (
 starttime : datetime = datetime(null),
 endtime : datetime = datetime(null),
 username_has_any : dynamic = dynamic([]),
 targetappname_has_any : dynamic = dynamic([]),
 srcipaddr_has_any_prefix : dynamic = dynamic([]),
 srchostname_has_any : dynamic = dynamic([]),
 eventtype_in : dynamic = dynamic([]),
 eventresultdetails_in : dynamic = dynamic([]),
 eventresult : string = '*',
 disabled : bool = false
) {
 StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
 | where not(disabled)
 | where (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
 and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
 | extend
 _OriginalEventType = EventType,
 _EventResult = iff(EventType == 'MultiFailLogin', 'Failure', 'Success')
 | where (eventresult == '*' or _EventResult =~ eventresult)
 | where (array_length(username_has_any) == 0
 or UserId has_any (username_has_any))
 | where (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0
 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(IpAddress, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
 | where (array_length(eventtype_in) == 0
 or 'Logon' in~ (eventtype_in))
 | extend
 EventSchemaVersion = '0.1.3',
 EventSchema = 'Authentication',
 EventProduct = 'StealthTalk',
 EventVendor = 'StealthTalk',
 EventType = 'Logon',
 EventResult = _EventResult,
 EventCount = int(1),
 EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
 EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
 EventUid = RawEventId,
 EventSeverity = case(
 Severity == 'High', 'High',
 Severity == 'Medium', 'Medium',
 Severity == 'Low', 'Low',
 'Informational'
 ),
 EventResultDetails = case(
 _OriginalEventType == 'MultiFailLogin',
 strcat('Failed attempts: ', tostring(PassedAttempts), ', blocked for: ', tostring(LoginBlockingSeconds), 's'),
 _OriginalEventType == 'GeoAnomalyLogin',
 strcat('Login from ', LoginCity, ' (', LoginCountry, '), assigned: ', AssignedCity, ' (', AssignedCountry, ')'),
 _OriginalEventType == 'NewDeviceLogin',
 strcat('New device: ', NewDeviceId, ', OS: ', NewDeviceOS),
 _OriginalEventType == 'OffHoursLogin',
 strcat('Deviation: ', tostring(DeviationMinutes), ' min, weekend: ', tostring(IsWeekend)),
 ''
 ),
 EventOriginalType = _OriginalEventType,
 TargetUserId = UserId,
 TargetUserIdType = 'Other',
 TargetUsername = UserId,
 TargetUsernameType = 'Other',
 SrcDeviceId = DeviceId,
 SrcIpAddr = iff(isnotempty(IpAddress), IpAddress, ''),
 SrcGeoCountry = iff(isnotempty(LoginCountry), LoginCountry, ''),
 SrcGeoCity = iff(isnotempty(LoginCity), LoginCity, ''),
 AdditionalFields = bag_pack(
 'AppVersion', AppVersion,
 'AssignedCountry', AssignedCountry,
 'AssignedCity', AssignedCity,
 'NewDeviceId', NewDeviceId,
 'NewDeviceOS', NewDeviceOS,
 'DeviationMinutes', DeviationMinutes,
 'IsWeekend', IsWeekend,
 'PassedAttempts', PassedAttempts,
 'LoginBlockingSeconds', LoginBlockingSeconds,
 'WorkingHoursStart', WorkingHoursStart,
 'WorkingHoursEnd', WorkingHoursEnd
 )
 | where (array_length(eventresultdetails_in) == 0
 or EventResultDetails in (eventresultdetails_in))
 | project
 TimeGenerated, EventSchemaVersion, EventSchema, EventProduct, EventVendor,
 EventType, EventResult, EventResultDetails, EventSeverity, EventOriginalType,
 EventCount, EventStartTime, EventEndTime, EventUid,
 TargetUserId, TargetUserIdType, TargetUsername, TargetUsernameType,
 SrcDeviceId, SrcIpAddr, SrcGeoCountry, SrcGeoCity, AdditionalFields
};
Parser(
 starttime = starttime,
 endtime = endtime,
 username_has_any = username_has_any,
 targetappname_has_any = targetappname_has_any,
 srcipaddr_has_any_prefix = srcipaddr_has_any_prefix,
 srchostname_has_any = srchostname_has_any,
 eventtype_in = eventtype_in,
 eventresultdetails_in = eventresultdetails_in,
 eventresult = eventresult,
 disabled = disabled
)
properties.FunctionParameters: starttime:datetime=datetime(null), endtime:datetime=datetime(null), username_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]), targetappname_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]), srcipaddr_has_any_prefix:dynamic=dynamic([]), srchostname_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]), eventtype_in:dynamic=dynamic([]), eventresultdetails_in:dynamic=dynamic([]), eventresult:string='*', disabled:bool=False
